ChangeRequest.name: Model Repurchase agreement as agreement, and legs as instrument
ChangeRequest.comment:
### Overview In issue #462, it came up that the current structure of the Repurchase agreements and their components do not correctly match the way banks see them. ### Contact person @Arjan.Bos
@sdressler ### Description of change request _Repurchase agreements_ are currently a subtype of _Security financing transation (SFT)_ and a sibling of _Loan (excluding repurchase agreement) and advance_. This request proposes four things - (1) Remove the awkward "(excluding repurchase agreement)" from the various entity type names (done in #511) - (2) Introduce a new generalisation called _Arrangement_ that groups together the various arrangements we have in the model: - Balance sheet netting arrangement - Master arrangement - Financial contract - Protection arrangement - (3) Change the supertype of _Securities financing transaction_ from _Instrument_ to the new generalisation _Arrangement_. - (4) Make the _Repurchase agreement component_ a subtype of _Loan_ and remove the discriminator from the primary key (but keep the attribute). ### Also to discuss: - Do the _Cash leg_ and the _Transferred asset leg_ have a unique identifier in banks that will not clash if we make them (a subtype of) loans? ### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes Miro board: [https://miro.com/app/board/uXjVKMSyqSU=/?moveToWidget=3458764624897516616&cot=14](https://miro.com/app/board/uXjVKMSyqSU=/?moveToWidget=3458764624897516616&cot=14) ![miro board with model sketch for arrangements](/uploads/4ff84f15e7eec6d7caec78623cbdb2f0/image.png) ### Entity types affected by the potential name change: ![Logical_-_SubView_1v1](/uploads/5770754713cc8e76eacf0af29c95596f/Logical_-_SubView_1v1.png)
